title: Potion Coffees
description: Change your life by removing the boring vanilla potions and change them with Coffee!
body:
![Icon](https://i.postimg.cc/FHWFy16M/image.png)

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/tFmJ75xp86) [![patreon-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/canvasofsouls) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/github-plural_64h.png)](https://github.com/Coconite/Coconite-Datapacks)

# 📖 Description

Tired of having to use the boring vanilla potions? Enhance your Minecraft experience with this Resourcepack.

This Resource pack changes the Drinkable Potions into a Capuccino Coffee

![Capuccino](https://i.postimg.cc/76QSjxf8/image.png)

Also changes the Splash Potions into an American Coffee

![American](https://i.postimg.cc/vZdfJ2H9/image.png)

---

# 👾 Bugs/Issues

This resourcepack may have incompatibility with other resourcepacks and Shaders. 

# Delete the folder "assets\minecraft\shaders" if you have issues.

Also, you can report another bug in my [github](https://github.com/Coconite/Coconite-Datapacks/issues)
